'''Pirik''' was a temperate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Pirik system/Legends|Pirik system]], in the [[Divis Arm/Legends|Divis Arm]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

The planetary [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Corint City]] was divided into districts, including [[Overtown District]], which was the seat of the planetary government; [[Talamp Industrial Sector|Talamp District]], the industrial section; and [[Lowtown District]], the seedier area of the [[City/Legends|city]] that included most of the local criminal underworld. Corint City was approximately nine miles from the [[Uloitir Sea]].

The planet was best known for the natives who mined [[Corintium]] ore as well as [[Ytterbium]].

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] infiltrator [[Shroud Team]], under the command of [[Dutra Zeneta]], made the planet an axis of rebellion during the days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In reprisal, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] tried to [[Attack on the Pirik system|attack Pirik]], but the planet defeated the Imperials mainly thanks to the efforts of [[Ma'w'shiye]].
